name: Teach Kids Games
short_description: This holiday season, spend quality time with your child and teach them to play games on the computer! Practice your Mouse and Keyboard Skills through Games! Explore 50+ fun mini-games for kids 3+, improve PC skills, track stats, and learn through play in a colorful, kid-friendly world!
detailed_description:
Practice Your Mouse and Keyboard Skills through Games!

Ideal for children aged 3 and up, Tech Kids Games offers a fun and interactive way to build confidence and precision with a computer mouse and keyboard.

Explore 50+ engaging mini-games designed to teach essential PC skills through play. From clicking, dragging, and double-clicking to typing challenges and navigating mazes, every game is tailored to improve fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination.

🎮 Features Include:

  • A variety of colorful and age-appropriate games for all skill levels.

  • Real-time stats to track progress and mastery of mouse movements.

  • Kid-friendly interface that’s easy to navigate.

  • Fun challenges like popping balloons, typing races, shape matching, and more!

Whether your child is just starting their tech journey or looking to sharpen their skills, Tech Kids Games is the perfect way to learn through play. Get ready to click, drag, and type your way to success!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
